## If this adds a NEW semantic token

1. **What role does it name?** (What recurring decision does it remove — not what colour it is.)

2. **Why can't an existing token serve it?** (Checked `muted`, `accent`, `surface-*`, status families?)

## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `pnpm tokens` and committed generated files (CI checks this)
- [ ] Checked light **and** dark at 375 / 768 / 1280
- [ ] Follows `design-guidelines.md` (sentence case, rationed teal, never colour alone, 4px grid)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if user-visible
